title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
